title: Birthday Dinner at a Fancy Restaurant

all.en: For my mother's sixtieth birthday, my family booked a table at an elegant French restaurant downtown.
all.zh: 為了慶祝媽媽六十歲生日，我們全家在市中心一間優雅的法式餐廳訂了位。

all.en: The restaurant had soft candlelight, white tablecloths, and a pianist playing gentle music in the corner.
all.zh: 餐廳裡有柔和的燭光、白色桌布，角落還有鋼琴師演奏輕柔的音樂。

all.en: A polite waiter handed us thick leather menus and recommended the chef's special tasting course.
all.zh: 一位有禮的服務生遞上厚厚的皮製菜單，並推薦主廚特製的品嚐套餐。

all.en: We started with a creamy mushroom soup that had a rich and earthy flavor.
all.zh: 我們以一碗奶油蘑菇湯開場，味道濃郁帶有泥土香氣。

all.en: The main course was tender beef steak served with roasted vegetables and a red wine sauce.
all.zh: 主菜是嫩煎牛排，搭配烤蔬菜與紅酒醬汁。

all.en: My father ordered a bottle of expensive wine to celebrate the special occasion.
all.zh: 爸爸點了一瓶昂貴的葡萄酒，慶祝這個特別的日子。

all.en: My mother could not stop smiling when she saw the dessert arrive with a candle on top.
all.zh: 當媽媽看到甜點端上來、上面插著一根蠟燭時，臉上的笑容停不下來。

all.en: The chocolate cake was decorated with fresh berries and a thin layer of gold leaf.
all.zh: 巧克力蛋糕上以新鮮莓果與一層薄薄的金箔裝飾。

all.en: We all sang happy birthday quietly so we would not disturb the other guests.
all.zh: 我們輕聲合唱生日快樂歌，以免打擾其他客人。

all.en: My mother said it was one of the most memorable nights of her life.
all.zh: 媽媽說這是她人生中最難忘的夜晚之一。

all.en: Although the bill was quite expensive, the experience was definitely worth every dollar.
all.zh: 雖然帳單相當昂貴，但這份體驗絕對值得每一分錢。

all.en: After dessert, the chef himself came out to greet our table and congratulate my mother.
all.zh: 甜點過後，主廚親自出來向我們這桌致意，並向母親道賀。

all.en: He presented her with a small bouquet of pink roses and signed a copy of his cookbook.
all.zh: 他送上一束小巧的粉色玫瑰，並在他的食譜書上簽名送給她。

all.en: My mother was so touched that her eyes filled with tears of joy and gratitude.
all.zh: 母親非常感動，雙眼盈滿了喜悅與感恩的淚水。

all.en: We took several family photos in front of the restaurant's beautifully decorated entrance.
all.zh: 我們在餐廳裝飾華麗的入口前拍了好幾張全家福。

all.en: My younger brother surprised everyone by giving a short speech to thank our parents.
all.zh: 我弟弟出乎意料地發表了一段簡短的演說，感謝我們的父母。

all.en: He thanked them for their patience, love, and the countless meals they had cooked.
all.zh: 他感謝他們的耐心、愛，以及曾為我們烹煮的無數頓飯。

all.en: Outside, a horse-drawn carriage was waiting to take my parents on a romantic ride.
all.zh: 門外，一輛馬車正等著載我父母進行一趟浪漫的兜風。

all.en: My father had secretly arranged this surprise with the restaurant manager weeks in advance.
all.zh: 父親早在幾週前就和餐廳經理秘密安排好了這個驚喜。

all.en: As they drove off through the quiet streets, we waved goodbye and felt deeply happy.
all.zh: 當他們駛過寂靜的街道離去時，我們揮手道別，心中無比幸福。

all.en: That birthday dinner reminded us how important it is to celebrate the people we love.
all.zh: 那場生日晚餐提醒了我們，慶祝我們所愛的人是多麼重要的事。
